title: taraxacum luteolum
intro: Taraxacum luteolum, also known as the yellow dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high concentration of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum luteolum include its ability to protect against oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum luteolum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
